/usr/bin/ar qc libmpifx.a CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/module.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_abort.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_allgather.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_allgatherv.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_allreduce.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_barrier.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_bcast.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_comm.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_constants.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_finalize.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_gather.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_gatherv.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_get_processor_name.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_helper.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_init.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_recv.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_reduce.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_scatter.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_scatterv.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_send.f90.o CMakeFiles/mpifx.dir/mpifx_win.f90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmpifx.a
